buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-[2px] h-11 px-8 shadow-sm
variants.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-11 px-8 rounded-[2px]

cards.product: group relative flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-white border border-border hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.feature: bg-surface p-8 border border-transparent hover:border-border transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: flex h-11 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

sections: Hero: Full width, clean water background, bold typography 'Industrial Grade Water Solutions'
Categories: Bento grid (Pumps, Tanks, Tools, Accessories)
Tools Teaser: Split section 'Find your Pump' vs 'Size your Tank'
Featured Products: Carousel or grid of top sellers
Trust Signals: 'South African Tough' badge, Certification icons

tools.pump_finder: Step-by-step wizard or Single page calculator. Inputs: Flow Rate, Head. Output: Recommended Products.
tools.tank_sizing: Calculator. Inputs: Users, Days backup. Output: Litres required + Tank suggestions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts for all headings. Import in index.css.
Implement the 'Quote Request' flow: Cart items are saved to a context/state, then submitted via a form. No Stripe/Payment.
Mock Data: specific pump models (e.g., 'Grundfos', 'DAB', 'Pascali') and tank sizes (e.g., '2500L', '5000L', '10000L') with ZAR pricing.
Ensure 'Pump Finder' and 'Tank Sizing' are functional React components with math logic.
Use the 'shadcn/ui' components found in /app/frontend/src/components/ui but customize their styles via tailwind classes to match the 'Industrial Clean' look (sharper corners, distinct borders).
For the Hero section, use the provided water texture image with a dark/blue overlay to ensure text readability.
Authentication: Implement JWT login/register screens using simple forms. Store token in localStorage.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, use solid white or very light gray.
Use high contrast for text. Black on White, White on Blue.
Responsive design is critical - check mobile view for tables and grids.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'Added to Quote').
